title: Rivian Gives EV Drivers Another Good Reason To Love Their Cars
description:
The US automaker Rivian has partnered with the clean energy software firm EnergyHub to connect more EV drivers with their local virtual power plant.

The post Rivian Gives EV Drivers Another Good Reason To Love Their Cars appeared first on CleanTechnica.
